description: The private key of a sensor, used to authenticate data posted to or read from its streams; recorded on the sensor asset as a string.
probe_semantics: Deliver the sensor ASSET's private_key string verbatim as recorded. Only explicitly-recorded keys are scoreable: when no key was stated the oracle MINTS a random one, which is machine-generated per instance and therefore unanswerable, never an empty value.

given: a sensor whose private key is the recorded string K
then: sensor_private_key of the sensor == K, verbatim

punts: kind='assertion' guessed deterministically from gap_kind='bundle_field'; field declared in a PHP attribute plugin's buildFieldDefinitions, not a YAML file
SHAPE DEVIATION from the propose-terms sketch: set at sensor-asset creation via the sensor given-step write surface, not via record_log — the field lives on the ASSET.

AUTHORITY REFINEMENT (BOUNDARY, defaulted case excluded): when the key is explicitly recorded the boundary returns it VERBATIM — VALIDATED LIVE (recorded 'w2sen-fixed-key-01', read back identical). When NOT recorded, default_value_callback DataStream::createUniqueKey mints a random 32-hex key per instance — VALIDATED LIVE (bare create delivered a fresh random key) — which can never reproduce across runs or ports; fixtures therefore always state the key explicitly, and a probe on a machine-minted key is UNANSWERABLE, never empty-valued (the unvalidated-derivation exclusion, stated up front this round — the e6p lesson).

NOTE 'hidden view' is display config only: JSON:API delivers private_key on GET regardless — VALIDATED LIVE. Selective-disclosure/permission handling is deferred with the role modules per the wave plan.

STANDING-POLICY DECISION (BIND-WITH-FEATURE): treated as BIND-WITH-FEATURE(sensor) under Duke's standing policy 'identity terms bind DURING their feature's port' (term-dispositions-2026-07-22.md) without a fresh per-term elicitation. Reversal condition: Duke may re-disposition at the next wave boundary; an unbound or retired term costs only its spec.
proposed by openai:gpt-5.6-terra (propose-terms); PROVISIONAL until first_pack_seal is filled by a real sealed recording
